subject: docs: remove completed plan-deliverable-1.md
body:
Every step in this plan is done — Expo project initialized, Supabase
schema with PostGIS, RLS policies, find_stations_in_radius function,
seed data — all reflected in CLAUDE.md Project Status. The plan has
served its purpose; git history retains the record. Drops the file
and its CLAUDE.md Architecture reference.

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-hygiene
Semver: patch
